newTests.name: copies the current draft body with the self-copy marker
keeps the copy button disabled until the editor WebView is ready
detects the self-copy marker after sanitization
writes HTML to the native clipboard with the HTML input format
shows an error toast and stays unconfirmed when the clipboard write fails
copies the note body with the self-copy marker and clean plain text
renders the copy button enabled for a non-empty note
writes the payload and toggles the on-button confirmation for ~1s
shows an error toast when no payload is returned
disables the copy button for an empty note body
produces non-empty plain text for an image-only note
round-trips alignment and font-size into the editor via insertContent
falls back to plain text when the HTML clipboard write is rejected
disables the copy button for an empty note body
shows the on-button confirmation after a successful copy
keeps the self-copy marker through sanitization (regression for the dropped-marker bug)
degrades images to alt text, or a placeholder when alt is missing
preserves alignment, font-size and color through resolvePaste
preserves superscript/subscript and base64 images through the round-trip
disables the copy button while the note is saving
surfaces an error toast when the clipboard write fails
disables the copy button for an empty draft body
does nothing for an empty body (no clipboard write, no confirmation)
